creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is the Silent Disco at the @natural_history_museum London where you can dance with the dinosaurs 🦕 

It’s a bucket list experience where you’ve got a selection of three DJs, all playing music on three wireless channels, and you can tune in, change songs whenever you want, with an incredible range of tracks. You can also purchase drinks when you’re there.

🗓️ Dates 2026:
Saturday 16th May
Friday 22nd May
Friday 26th June
Friday 31st July
Friday 14th August
Friday 28th August
Friday 25th September

🎟️ Book online on the Natural History Museum website
📍 Natural History Museum, Cromwell Rd, South
Kensington, SW7 5BD

transcription.text: to give my prayers. One, two, three, four. Give me, give me, give me a man. I'm so bitter, I'm so lost, somebody help me chase the shadows away.
